button_text: Start Practice!

Look at the hint image and select the correct way to talk about what born leadership offers

1.Born leadership offers a natural ability to inspire and influence people from an early stage.
2.Born leadership has no value in a professional setting.

Correct answer: 1

Look at the hint image and select the correct way to talk about the drawback of learned leadership

1.Learned leadership is always perfect and has no limitations.
2.While learned leadership offers structured development, it also has the challenge of lacking natural instincts in crisis situations.

Correct answer: 2
Born leadership offers an innate ability to remain calm and decisive under challenging situations.
While born leadership offers natural charisma, it also has the risk of being resistant to feedback and new ideas.
Learned leadership offers the advantage of applying tested strategies and frameworks to manage people.
While learned leadership offers planned growth, it also has the challenge of taking time and consistent effort to develop.
Combining born talent and learned skills offers the most effective form of leadership in any organization.

first_message: That was incredible! Now we're going to practice by answering few questions in English. Can we start?

questions: "'1. What does born leadership offer to a team facing a sudden challenge? Use Structure 1.'

'2. While born leadership offers strong vision, what risk does it also bring to the team? Use Structure 2.'

'3. What does learned leadership offer to professionals who want to grow into senior roles? Use Structure 1.'

'4. While learned leadership offers structured growth, what challenge does it also present? Use Structure 2.'

'5. What does a combination of born and learned leadership offer to an organization's long-term success? Use Structure 1.'"
